title: Job Opening Category Manager at BikeDekho Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at BikeDekho Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Join the BikeDekho Advisory Limited family as a Category Manager in Rajkot. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BikeDekho Advisory Limited:
BikeDekho Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BikeDekho Advisory Limited!
